initiatives.title: format_range_preview no longer returns empty diff for dirty input
initiatives.notes: Whole-doc format + line-level splice via SpliceFormattedRange. Defect B (compile_check filter false-clean) was closed in v1.18.2.

initiatives.title: ChangeSignatureService op=add no longer concatenates body brace
initiatives.notes: ParseParameter + ParseParameterList; preserve enclosing trivia via WithTriviaFrom. Drops ParameterListFromText helper.

initiatives.title: Tighten isReady; add analyzersReady; transient-stale restoreHint
initiatives.notes: Bundle Rule 1 verified at WorkspaceStatusSummaryDto.cs:52. AnalyzersReady is a new record field; isReady now requires it. Transient-stale heuristic uses errors==0 + IsStale signal (no ChangeTracker dependency added).

initiatives.title: find_references summary=true mode
initiatives.notes: summary=false default preserves shape; new summary=true drops PreviewText.

initiatives.title: change_signature_preview enumerates all interface-implementer callsite files
initiatives.notes: CollectRelatedSymbolsAsync walks interface members + implementations + overrides + base virtuals.

initiatives.title: get_nuget_dependencies summary=true mode
initiatives.notes: New NuGetPackageSummaryDto + Summaries field on result. summary=true returns per-package counts + DistinctVersionCount.

initiatives.title: get_syntax_tree gains maxNodes and maxTotalBytes
initiatives.notes: SyntaxBudget extended with RemainingNodes + RemainingBytes.

initiatives.title: symbol_impact_sweep summary=true + maxItemsPerCategory
initiatives.notes: summary forwards to FindReferencesAsync.

initiatives.title: validate_workspace summary=true mode
initiatives.notes: Drops ErrorDiagnostics + DiscoveredTests.

initiatives.title: extract_type_preview refuses when external consumers exist
initiatives.notes: Re-scoped from rewrite to refuse.

initiatives.title: Tool parameter-binding errors return structured payloads
initiatives.notes: Narrow-scope inner-walker for invocation wrappers.

initiatives.title: server_info.update.latest no longer inverts
initiatives.notes: Added ILatestVersionProvider abstraction.

initiatives.title: stdout flushed on stdin-EOF / process exit
initiatives.notes: AppDomain.ProcessExit + sync flush.

initiatives.title: Windows paths in roslyn://workspace/{id}/file/ resource
initiatives.notes: Centralized NormalizeFilePathForResource helper; doc-string updated to clarify URL-encoded is preferred but raw paths also work server-side. Comprehensive regression tests for every encoding shape (raw, fully-encoded, forward-slash, partial-encode, encoded-forward-slashes).

initiatives.title: source_file_lines resource structured errors
initiatives.notes: Wrapped GetSourceFileLines in ToolErrorHandler.ExecuteResourceAsync; validation exceptions now emit structured envelope with the resource URI template as the tool field.

initiatives.title: get_prompt_text wraps JsonReaderException
initiatives.notes: BuildParameterValuesAsync wraps both JsonDocument.Parse and per-parameter JsonSerializer.Deserialize; re-throws as ArgumentException naming parametersJson.

initiatives.title: workspace_close no longer falsely reports auto-reload
initiatives.notes: Local `reloaded` flag gates the StaleAction stamp; fake ReloadThrowsKeyNotFound exercises the race case.

initiatives.title: project_graph always populates Name and ProjectPath
initiatives.notes: ResolveProjectName + ResolveProjectPath helpers with fallback chain; BuildProjectStatuses routes top-level + reference entries through them.

initiatives.title: restructure_preview substitutes placeholders correctly
initiatives.notes: Extract placeholder names from both pattern and goal; refuse orphaned goal placeholders with ArgumentException; fast-path gate moved to goal's set. First RestructureService tests (3 cases).

initiatives.title: validate_workspace flags fabricated changedFilePaths
initiatives.notes: ResolveChangedFiles partitions caller paths into Known/Unknown against the workspace document set; surfaces Unknown on a new DTO field. Change-tracker fallback path unchanged.

initiatives.title: roslyn://server/catalog paginated
initiatives.notes: Default catalog now summary shape; 3 new resources (full, tools page, prompts page); new DTOs + PageEntries helper.

initiatives.title: Parameter-position locator for change_signature op=remove
initiatives.notes: Auto-promote IParameterSymbol → containing method + splice parameter index into request.Position when Position/Name unset.

initiatives.title: test_reference_map paginated, projectName honored
initiatives.notes: offset/limit params on tool + service; projectName now filters productive-symbol collection when the name matches a productive project; DTO extended with offset/limit/totals/hasMore. First TestReferenceMapService tests (6 cases).

initiatives.title: symbol_impact_sweep race-aware errors during auto-reload
initiatives.notes: Race-aware WorkspaceReloadedDuringCall envelope in ToolErrorHandler.ClassifyError; triggers when AmbientGateMetrics.Current.StaleAction == auto-reloaded. Solution-wide, not just ImpactSweepService. Also shipped chore/ci-baseline-fixes (PR #196) to unblock the pipeline.

initiatives.title: symbol_info requires explicit allowAdjacent=true
initiatives.notes: SymbolResolver.ResolveAsync/ResolveAtPositionAsync gain `strict: bool = false` (defaults preserve lenient); SymbolSearchService.GetSymbolInfoAsync threads through an `allowAdjacent: bool = false` flag; symbol_info tool exposes the opt-in. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: symbol_search matches against fully-qualified names
initiatives.notes: Added FQN-substring pass after primary pattern search; walks types + members via QualifiedNameOnlyFormat. 2 regression tests.

initiatives.title: test_coverage structured error when Coverlet missing
initiatives.notes: FindTestProjectsWithoutCoverlet pre-flight check inspects csproj PackageReference content; returns MissingPackages-populated CoverletMissing envelope before launching dotnet test.

initiatives.title: test_related finds tests through interface dispatch
initiatives.notes: Two-pass: heuristic name match (kept) + SymbolFinder.FindReferencesAsync over the symbol + implementations/overrides; test files matching reference paths merged into the result. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: bulk_replace_type walks implemented-interface generic args
initiatives.notes: crossedGenericBoundary flag + SimpleBaseTypeSyntax acceptance under scope=parameters; BulkRefactoringService + catalog + tool surface synced.

initiatives.title: All responses camelCase; _meta on every read-tool response
initiatives.notes: Infrastructure already shipped via PR #200 (StructuredCallToolFilter) + JsonDefaults.Indented + MetaSerializer.CamelCase. This PR ratifies the contract by adding ResponseShape_PascalCaseDtoSerialization_EmitsCamelCaseKeysAndCamelCaseMeta regression test that pins both halves: (a) JsonDefaults.Indented round-trips PascalCase DTO properties as camelCase JSON, and (b) StructuredCallToolFilter.InjectMetaIntoContent emits a top-level _meta block with camelCase fields on every successful object-rooted response. BREAKING for any client parsing PascalCase. 0 production files touched (no behavioural change beyond what PR #200 already shipped); 1 test file extended.

initiatives.title: extract_type_apply strips override when target doesn't inherit base
initiatives.notes: StripInheritanceOnlyModifiers composed with EnsurePublicAccessibility inside BuildNewFileRoot; strips override/virtual/abstract/member-sealed/new since the extracted type is emitted with no base list. 1 regression test covering override + sealed-override.

initiatives.title: change_signature_preview op=add proper spacing + default value
initiatives.notes: Resolved by I-02 merger (PR #166) — ChangeSignatureService.cs:101-103 + BuildParameterListFromTextChange correctly emit 'Type name = DefaultValue' with proper spacing.

initiatives.title: fix_all_preview distinguishes empty-result reasons + provider coverage
initiatives.notes: Bundle Rule 1 verified at FixAllService.PreviewFixAllAsync — all 4 empty-result paths now emit a scenario-specific guidanceMessage; CodeFixProviderRegistry unchanged. 1 production file touched (FixAllService.cs), 1 test file added (FixAllServiceGuidanceTests.cs, 8 cases).

initiatives.title: PreviewStore per-token snapshot isolation
initiatives.notes: Bundle Rule 1 verified. BREAKING — preview retrieval contract changed.

initiatives.title: Cross-project interface extraction whitespace fix
initiatives.notes: CreateCompilationUnitForMember gains normalizeWhitespace flag (true on synthesized-interface path, false on move-type path). AddBaseType + new EnsureOpeningBraceOnOwnLine helper mirror InterfaceExtractionService. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: dependency_inversion_preview source-formatting preserved
initiatives.notes: Dropped NormalizeWhitespace() on source file in CreateInterfaceExtractionSolutionAsync; parameter-type replacement uses WithTriviaFrom; AddBaseType relocates identifier trailing EOL trivia to brace leading trivia. Also closes dr-9-10-format-bug-005-renders-declaration-without-spac (I-32, obsolete — resolved by I-02/PR #166).

initiatives.title: migrate_package_preview ItemGroup XML formatting
initiatives.notes: OrchestrationMsBuildXml gains FormatProjectXml + AddChildElementPreservingIndentation + RemoveElementCleanly helpers; UTF-8 MemoryStream-backed XmlWriter. 2 regression tests.

initiatives.title: extract_type_preview blank-line preservation
initiatives.notes: BuildNewFileRoot post-processes NormalizeWhitespace() output via new EnsureBlankLineBetweenNamespaceAndType helper — prepends an EndOfLineTrivia to the first type declaration inside either file-scoped or block namespace, idempotent. 1 regression test verified to fail pre-fix.

initiatives.title: extract_interface_preview base-list inline continuation
initiatives.notes: PreviewExtractInterfaceAsync transfers last existing base type's trailing trivia onto new interface before AddTypes. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: format_range_preview full whitespace normalization
initiatives.notes: Verified NOT obsolete; I-01 covered tab/trailing cases but not multi-blank-line runs. CollapseBlankLineRunsInRange post-pass after SpliceFormattedRange. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: extract_method_preview project-formatting compliance
initiatives.notes: Bundled with I-42 (Rule 1 verified at ExtractMethodService.cs — single root cause for both shapes). ExtractMethodService synthesizes the new method + call statement with Formatter.Annotation and runs Formatter.FormatAsync(document, Formatter.Annotation, …) so editorconfig drives spacing, indentation, and brace placement.

initiatives.title: extract_method_preview body and closing brace correctness
initiatives.notes: Bundled with I-41 (Rule 1 verified at ExtractMethodService.cs). Same fix: Formatter.Annotation + document-wide Formatter.FormatAsync replace the in-isolation NormalizeWhitespace + manual Whitespace/CarriageReturnLineFeed hacks. Body brace tokens use ElasticCarriageReturnLineFeed so the formatter separates closing braces (no `}}` glue) and re-indents body statements.

initiatives.title: split_class_preview no longer duplicates leading trivia
initiatives.notes: Second partial strips attribute lists + resets leading trivia; new StripLeadingTriviaFromFirstUsing helper moves license headers off cloned usings. 1 regression test.

initiatives.title: *_apply no longer reserializes unrelated csprojs
initiatives.notes: P2 critical destructive side-effect. Heroic. Investigation risk: if Roslyn-internal MSBuildWorkspace setting exists, fix is small; if not, snapshot-all-csprojs + semantic-XML-diff helper required. Per executor: verify all other initiatives merged or obsolete before starting.
